response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management and organizational change leadership, and his resume is disorganized with overlapping dates and unclear reporting lines.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops teaching testing/DevOps
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and embedded systems with strong automation focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Employment history has overlapping dates and ambiguous roles (e.g., Founder at MercadoLibre while employed elsewhere)
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or organizational change initiatives
